title: Origins Shattered
description: Shatters Origins into shards Allowing it to be obtained within survival
body:
Shatters Origins into shards Allowing it to be obtained within survival similar to [Orb of Origin Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/orb-of-origin-plus) This mod is part of the Shattered series along with [Blessings Shattered](https://modrinth.com/mod/blessings-shattered) and [Classes Shattered](https://modrinth.com/mod/classes-shattered) Specifically Designed to be used within the [Sanctuary ModPack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sanctuary-remake)
Feedback
